message.content:
@startuml
title create order sequence diagram

actor Customer
actor Cashier
participant ":Inventory System" as IS
participant ":Order" as Order
participant ":Product" as Product
participant ":Stock" as Stock
participant ":Invoice" as Invoice
participant ":Transaction" as Transaction

Customer -> Cashier : 1. Request order product
Cashier --> Customer : 2. Receive order

Cashier -> IS : 3. requestCreateOrder()
IS -> Product : 3.1 selectProduct()
Product -> Stock : 3.2 checkStock()
Stock --> Product : 3.3 return stock
Product --> IS : 3.4 return product

alt IF (stock.qty > order.qty)
    IS -> Order : 3.5 createOrder(order)
    Order -> Stock : 3.6 updateStock()
    Stock --> IS : 3.7 return update stock
    Order -> Invoice : 3.8 systemCreateInvoice()
    Invoice -> Transaction : 3.9 printInvoice()
    Invoice --> IS : 3.10 return invoice
    Order --> IS : 3.11 return order
else [ELSE]
    Order --> IS : 3.12 can't create order
end

IS --> Cashier : 4. response create order status
Cashier --> Customer : 5. Invoice

@enduml
